message:
feat: add brief mode to kg_node, FTS5 snippets, vector search excerpts

kg_node defaults to brief mode: returns metadata + connection titles
without full content or edge context. Full mode available with
brief=false, content truncated to 2000 chars by default.

Search results now include excerpts: FTS5 snippet() for fulltext,
first paragraph for semantic search.

Added store methods: countEdgesFrom/To, getEdgeSummariesFrom/To.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
